summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Coffee Bliss. 15/15 backend tests pass (after fixing email-case assertion in our test). Frontend home/menu/cart/admin/login/register flows all verified working. Admin login redirects to /admin and lists 10 seeded products. Menu category filter works (Coffee tab shows 4 coffee items). Cart drawer opens on add, supports qty +/-, remove, shows correct subtotal. Checkout while unauthenticated redirects to /login as expected.

minor.issue: Returns 401 in browser console on every page load when not logged in - expected, but could be silenced in frontend AuthContext to avoid console noise

action_items: Optional: Suppress 401 console.error from AuthContext bootstrap call to /api/auth/me when no cookie present

Optional: backend FRONTEND_URL in /app/backend/.env points to a different preview host (26e73339-...) than the actual REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL host (premium-coffee-ui-2). CORS still works because the preview ingress sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * before reaching FastAPI, but for production hardening keep both env values aligned
critical_code_review_comments: FastAPI CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router(api). In FastAPI/Starlette, middleware should be added before mounting routes; current placement still works because middleware is resolved lazily, but it is fragile - move add_middleware before include_router
set_auth_cookies uses secure=False - acceptable for HTTP preview but should be True in prod via env flag
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI - prefer lifespan context manager
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook calls for 5-attempt lockout)
bcrypt hash format verified to start with $2b$ (correct)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_user_* registrations and one TEST_AdminProd that was deleted in same test run (no leftover)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering 15 cases across products, testimonials, auth, admin CRUD, contact, orders. Frontend testids: nav-cart-button, cart-drawer, cart-checkout-button, cart-qty-inc/dec/-, cart-remove-{id}, product-add-{id}, category-{coffee|beverages|desserts|all}, login-email/password/submit, register-name/email/password/confirm/submit, admin-name/description/price/image/add-product, admin-delete-{id}.
